title: Ihram for Hajj and Move to Mina
instruction: Enter Ihram for Hajj, renew your intention, and continue Talbiyah. Travel to Mina and establish prayers there.
details: Pray Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha, and Fajr in Mina. Keep your heart in remembrance and avoid disputes.

title: Wuquf at Arafah (Core Pillar)
instruction: After sunrise, head to Arafah and remain until sunset in dua, repentance, and devotion.
recite: La ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulk wa lahul-hamd wa huwa ala kulli shay'in qadir.
details: This is the greatest day of Hajj. Missing Arafah invalidates Hajj, so prioritize reaching and remaining there properly.

title: Muzdalifah Stay and Pebble Collection
instruction: After sunset, move to Muzdalifah, pray Maghrib and Isha together, rest, and collect pebbles for stoning.
recite: Continue Talbiyah, istighfar, and simple adhkar.
details: Collect pebbles calmly and prepare mentally for the rites of the next day.

title: Stone Jamarat al-Aqabah (7 Pebbles)
instruction: Stone the largest pillar (Aqabah) with 7 pebbles, saying takbir each throw.
details: Follow crowd-control timings and keep safe spacing. Do not endanger yourself or others.

title: Sacrifice (Hady) and Hair Trimming
instruction: Offer the sacrificial animal (directly or via authorized service), then shave or trim hair.
recite: Make gratitude dua and ask for acceptance.
details: After stoning and hair cut, many Ihram restrictions are lifted (first tahallul), depending on your sequence.

title: Tawaf al-Ifadah and Sa'i (if due)
instruction: Proceed to Makkah for Tawaf al-Ifadah. Perform Sa'i if required for your Hajj type.
recite: Any authentic dhikr and personal supplication.
details: This Tawaf is a pillar of Hajj. Coordinate with your group to avoid missing logistics and deadlines.

title: Stone All Three Jamarat
instruction: After midday each day, stone the small, middle, and large Jamarat (7 pebbles each).
recite: Say Allahu Akbar on each throw and make dua after first and second pillars.
details: You may leave Mina after day 12 before sunset, or remain through day 13, which is preferable when possible.

title: Farewell Tawaf (Tawaf al-Wada')
instruction: Complete your final Tawaf before departing Makkah.
recite: Ask Allah to accept your Hajj and grant steadfastness after return.
details: Generally obligatory for pilgrims leaving Makkah; confirm personal exemptions with qualified scholars.
